what: Verify Claude Code CLI is installed and accessible
why: Nori depends on Claude Code for AI operations — must validate before use
output: CLI availability status including version information

success_handling.criteria: Claude Code CLI found and responds to version check

event.message: Claude Code CLI is installed and accessible

error_handling.criteria: Claude Code CLI binary not found in PATH
error_handling.action: Prompt user to install Claude Code CLI

event.message: Claude Code CLI not found — please install it to continue

error_handling.criteria: CLI binary exists but reports an unsupported version

event.message: Claude Code CLI version {found_version} does not match expected {expected_version}

decisions.outcome: Halt boot, prompt user to install Claude Code
